title: rubus bonus-henricus
intro: Rubus bonus-henricus, also known as Autumn Olive, is a deciduous shrub native to East Asia and Europe. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its fruit and leaves, which contain antioxidants and polyphenols that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus bonus-henricus include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in the treatment of certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Autumn Olive can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
